title: Linai and the Wobbly Wall
description: Linai tests two playful plans before finding a joyful way past a stubborn wall.

acts.approachText: Linai floats up to a wobbly wall and studies its cracks before deciding what to try.

choices.label: Knock politely
choices.outcomeText: The wall boings back and leaves Linai wobbling in surprise.

choices.label: Climb over
choices.outcomeText: Linai finds a gentle updraft and scoots neatly over the top.

acts.approachText: A proud bird blocks the path, puffing its chest while Linai slows to a curious hover.

choices.label: Offer a crumb
choices.outcomeText: The bird chirps with delight and flutters aside to let Linai pass.

choices.label: Wave arms wildly
choices.outcomeText: The bird flaps back even harder and Linai has to regroup.
